title: podospermum pumilum
intro: Podospermum pumilum, also known as the Dwarf Broom Currant or Buttonbush, is a small shrub native to the Western Cape of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Podospermum pumilum is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is commonly prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
